allow: PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem -Recurse "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement\\apps\\backend\\src" -Directory; foreach\($d in $dirs\){ Write-Output \("DIR: " + $d.FullName\); Get-ChildItem $d.FullName -File | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("   " + $_.Name\) } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement\\apps\\backend" -File -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }; Write-Output "--- root ---"; Get-ChildItem "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement" -File -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement\\apps\\frontend\\src\\dashboard\\pages\\settings" -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; Write-Output "--- services ---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement\\packages\\shared\\services" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:\\Projects\\TempleManagement\\apps\\backend"; $env:JWT_SECRET="test-secret"; $env:MONGO_URI="mongodb://localhost:27017/test"; node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('APP IMPORT OK'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('IMPORT FAIL:', e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { "python: $\($py.Source\)"; python --version } else { "python: NOT FOUND" }; $pg = Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($pg\) { "psql: $\($pg.Source\)" } else { "psql: not on PATH" }; try { $c = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5432 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "port 5432 open: $\($c.TcpTestSucceeded\)" } catch { "port test failed" })
